description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Windows Platform that runs on push and pull request events. Set up a test job matrix with multiple Node.js versions (18.x, 20.x, 21.x, 22.x), architectures (x64, x86), and Windows OS versions (2019, 2022). For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11 and the specified Node.js version, verify Node.js installation, install dependencies with npm, and run npm tests.
